entries.content: For worker-free Temporal Visibility status tables, combine ADV custom lifecycle search attributes with server-owned `ExecutionStatus = "Running"` to exclude completed workflows when custom status upserts are best-effort or stale.

When adding `ExecutionStatus = "Running"` to shared Temporal Visibility enumeration, preserve `statuses: null` all-status mode and terminal-status overrides; archive/audit callers need completed/archived executions visible.
